master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “A Pipa de 1924”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside a century-old family wine estate, the Adega Seixas, on the misty morning after the patriarch is found dead in the underground barrel cellar, soaked in red wine from an antique barrel, on the eve of the winery's centennial celebration. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Vinícola Seixas is a historic Brazilian highland wine estate with a stone-vaulted underground cellar (adega de caverna) lined with dark oak barrels (pipas), a vaulted stone ceiling with amber lamps, a tasting bench with crystal glasses and leather harvest ledgers, an upstairs tasting salon with old labels pinned to a cork board, a patriarch's office with a jacaranda desk and an antique iron safe, and a wide wood-floored corridor with a vintage wall clock and an electronic access panel; the estate is wrapped in cool dawn mist over the vineyard. Color palette: deep wine red #5C1A1B, dried blood burgundy #3A0E0F, oak brown #3E2418, warm amber lamp light #C68A3E, ochre #B08A3E, aged bronze #7A5A2A, cool stone gray #3A3A3D, pale chalk-stone white #EDE6D3, vine-leaf green #2B3A2E. Lighting: warm amber cellar lamps against cool stone shadow, dramatic contrast between the deep red of the spilled wine and the cold gray vault, soft golden reflections on polished bronze spigots, subtle film grain. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: oak barrels (pipas), brass and bronze spigots, wine glasses, antique wine bottles, leather harvest ledgers, handwritten labels, wax-sealed bottle tops, corks, wicker baskets, grapevines. Avoid horror, gore, blood spatter (spilled wine is fine), weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “A Pipa de 1924”. Show the interior of the stone-vaulted underground cellar (adega de caverna) at the historic Vinícola Seixas on a misty dawn morning. The main focus is the row of dark oak barrels (pipas) along the back wall, with one barrel in the center having a fresh dent at its base where a fallen man's silhouette suggests a body without gore — a shape in nightclothes lying still on the stone floor, soaked in a dark pool of spilled red wine spreading from a small open brass spigot on the barrel. Above, a single hanging amber lamp casts a cold pool of light over the scene; the vaulted stone ceiling recedes into shadow. A spiral stone staircase descends into the cellar on the right. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the dented barrel and the wine-soaked fallen figure slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the deep red of the spilled wine against the cold gray stone to create drama and depth. Mood: refined, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, somber, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “A Pipa de 1924”. Show a small polished brass spigot (torneirinho) mounted on the side of a dark oak wine barrel, open and dripping a thin stream of dark red wine, dominating the frame. The base of the barrel shows a fresh dent in the wood near the spigot, the central mystery detail, while most of the oak surface is aged and streaked. A dark pool of spilled red wine spreads across the cool stone floor at the foot of the barrel. Behind it, softly blurred, the row of oak barrels and the amber glow of a cellar lamp. Composition: square close-up still life, the open brass spigot and the dented oak barrel base are the clear focal points, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the warm brass, the dark oak, the deep red wine, and the cold gray stone. The open spigot and dent should remain instantly readable as objects that hide something, even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary, somber.

adega.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Adega de caverna”, the central crime scene at Vinícola Seixas. Show the stone-vaulted underground cellar with rows of dark oak barrels (pipas) lining both sides of a central stone corridor, illuminated by warm amber hanging lamps. At the back, one barrel has a fresh dent at its base, beside a fallen shape in nightclothes suggesting the body of an older man without gore, lying in a dark pool of spilled red wine spreading from a small open brass spigot. A tasting bench with crystal glasses sits at the far end, under a single amber lamp. A spiral stone staircase descends into the cellar on the right. Composition: the dented barrel, the open spigot, and the wine-soaked fallen figure are the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding cellar context to establish the location. Mood: quiet, suspicious, somber, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: dented barrel base, open brass spigot, spilled red wine pool, fallen figure in nightclothes, spiral stone staircase, tasting bench, amber lamps.

bancada.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Bancada de degustação” at the back of the cellar. Show a wooden tasting bench under a single hanging amber lamp, with clean crystal glasses, an open unlabeled wine bottle, and an open black notebook with recent pencil notes. At one end, a disordered pile of papers and a leather-bound record book rest beside the notebook. The dark oak barrels of the cellar recede softly into shadow behind the bench. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the bench, the open notebook, the unlabeled bottle, and the leather record book all visible enough to function as clues, but not overly dramatic. Mood: orderly, scholarly, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: open notebook with pencil notes, unlabeled open bottle, leather record book, crystal glasses, disordered papers.

salao_provas.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Salão de provas” on the upper floor of the estate. Show a long tasting table with inverted crystal glasses on white cloths, a cork board on the wall with old vintage wine labels pinned in year order, and an open cabinet with wooden boxes of antique bottles. Soft daylight from windows overlooking the vineyard mixes with warm amber lamplight. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the room as a formal tasting salon, with the cork board of labels and the open cabinet noticeable enough to function as clues. Mood: orderly, refined, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: inverted crystal glasses, cork board with pinned vintage labels, open cabinet, wooden boxes of antique bottles.

escritorio.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Escritório de Augusto”, the patriarch's private office. Show a jacaranda wood desk with organized stacks of papers, a calendar open to the centennial week, and a pair of reading glasses resting on a tobacco wallet. Bookshelves of old contracts line the walls, and between two framed paintings sits an antique iron safe, its door slightly ajar. Warm amber desk lamp light mixes with cool window shadow. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot establishing the office, with the desk, the ajar safe, and the contract bookshelves visible enough to function as clues. Mood: orderly, traditional, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: jacaranda desk, organized papers, centennial calendar, reading glasses, ajar iron safe, contract bookshelves.

corredor_casa.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Corredor da casa grande”, the main corridor of the estate. Show a wide corridor with dark wooden floorboards, framed vintage harvest photos on the walls, and a vintage wall clock marking the hour. Beside the heavy door that leads down to the cellar, an electronic access panel on the wall displays a chronological list of credentials and timestamps. The air smells of wood wax and brewed coffee. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot of the corridor, with the electronic access panel clearly readable as the key clue beside the cellar door. Mood: domestic, quiet, restrained, quietly suspicious, somber. Important visual clues: electronic access panel with credential list, heavy cellar door, vintage wall clock, framed harvest photos, dark wooden floor.

pipa_amassada.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Pipa amassada”, the central clue in the mystery. Show the lower side of a dark oak wine barrel (pipa), with a fresh dent in the wood near the base, the wood slightly splintered and lighter where it was struck. Most of the surrounding oak surface is aged and streaked, but a band around the dent has been recently rubbed, as if someone tried to wipe away handprints — though a thin dark stream of red wine still seeps from a joint above. The cold gray stone floor and the blurred row of barrels fill the background. Composition: close-up still life, the dented base of the oak barrel dominates the frame, with realistic wood grain, the wiped band, and the seeping wine clearly readable. Mood: intimate, suspicious, weighted, elegant, quiet, important.

torneirinho_bronze.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Torneirinho de bronze aberto”. Show a small polished brass spigot (torneirinho) mounted on the side of a dark oak wine barrel, turned open and dripping a thin stream of dark red wine onto the cool stone floor. The joint of the spigot appears loosened, as if forced, not simply turned. Around it, the dark oak grain, a faint wet sheen, and the blurred amber glow of a cellar lamp. Composition: square close-up still life, the open brass spigot and its wine drip are the clear focal point, with realistic metal, oak, and liquid texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ordinary but important, investigative, somber.

caderno_safras.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caderno de safras”. Show a black-covered notebook lying open on a wooden tasting bench, with dense recent handwritten pencil notes comparing vintage wine labels and bottle records. The word 'diferente' appears several times in the margins alongside dated entries and small drawn sketches of bottle levels. A pencil rests across the page, and printed pages peek from underneath. A single warm desk lamp lights the page, leaving the rest of the bench in soft shadow. Composition: square close-up still life, the open notebook is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, calm, investigative, scholarly, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: open notebook, handwritten 'diferente' notes, bottle-level sketches, pencil, printed pages underneath.

discurso_centenario.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Discurso do centenário”. Show three typewritten pages partly covered by the black notebook, with red pen marks circling passages about the true story of the 1924 lot and striking through lines of celebration. The pages clearly read as a draft centennial speech without needing legible small text. A red pen lies across the top page, and the desk lamp casts warm amber light across the paper. Composition: square close-up still life, the marked speech pages are the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and visible red pen annotations. Mood: quiet, suspicious, weighty, investigative, literary. Important visual clues: typewritten speech pages, red pen marks, circled passages about 1924, struck-through celebration lines, red pen.

garrafa_1924.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Garrafa do lote 1924”. Show a dark glass wine bottle with no label, standing open on a wooden tasting bench, beside a used crystal glass with a small residue of dark red wine at the bottom. The residue has a slightly lighter color and an odd sediment that does not match a century-old red. A corkscrew rests beside the bottle, and the bench has faint ring stains. A warm desk lamp and the blurred cellar behind fill the background. Composition: close-up still life, the open unlabeled bottle and the used glass with the off-color residue are the clear focal points, with realistic glass, liquid, and sediment texture. Mood: quiet, suspicious, intimate, investigative, weighty. Important visual clues: open unlabeled bottle, used crystal glass, off-color residue with odd sediment, corkscrew, bench ring stains.

rotulos_antigos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Quadro de rótulos antigos”. Show a cork board on the wall of the tasting salon, with old paper wine labels pinned in year order. Three of the labels marked '1924' have been pinned again recently with noticeably newer, shinier thumbtacks and oddly clean paper compared to their darker, aged neighbors. Pushpins and small handwritten year tags complete the board. A desk lamp casts warm amber light across the cork. Composition: square close-up still life, the cork board of labels is the clear focal point, with the mismatched thumbtacks and clean 1924 labels clearly readable. Mood: orderly, quiet, archival, quietly suspicious, weighty. Important visual clues: cork board, pinned vintage labels, three 1924 labels with newer shiny thumbtacks, oddly clean paper, year tags.

caixa_1924.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Caixa do lote 1924”. Show an open dark wooden box stamped 'LOTE 1924 — GUARDA' on the side, resting in an open cabinet, with several dark glass wine bottles lying inside. The bottles have different fill levels from one another, and their wax seals show subtly different shades of red, as if some were opened, blended, and resealed at separate times. A thin film of dust on the box contrasts with cleaner patches where bottles were handled. Composition: close-up still life, the open labeled wooden box with the mismatched bottles dominates the frame, with realistic wood, glass, and wax texture and visible fill-level differences. Mood: quiet, suspicious, archival, investigative, weighty. Important visual clues: open wooden box, LOTE 1924 stamp, bottles with different fill levels, mismatched wax seal shades, dust patterns.

livro_razao.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Livro-razão da vinícola”. Show a leather-bound accounting ledger lying open on a jacaranda desk, with ruled columns of handwritten entries and exits over the past two years. A two-year-old entry shows a large 'guarda lot sale' with no matching invoice number, circled in red pen, beside an obvious shortfall in the running balance. A fountain pen rests across the page. Warm amber desk lamp light falls across the ledger. Composition: square close-up still life, the open ledger is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, quiet, archival, quietly suspicious, weighty. Important visual clues: open leather ledger, ruled columns, circled 'guarda lot sale' with no invoice, marked shortfall, fountain pen.

porta_cofre.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Cofre aberto”. Show an antique iron safe between two framed paintings on an office wall, its heavy door standing slightly ajar. Through the gap, an empty manila folder with the label '1924 — auditoria' sits pulled partway out, clearly missing the document it once held, and the folder sits slightly warm and out of place. The dark interior of the safe and the cool shadow of the office frame the scene. Composition: square close-up still life, the ajar iron safe door and the pulled-out empty folder are the clear focal points, with realistic metal texture and visible label. Mood: quiet, suspicious, weighty, investigative, somber. Important visual clues: ajar iron safe door, empty '1924 — auditoria' folder, pulled-out folder, dark safe interior.

painel_acessos.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Painel eletrônico de acessos”. Show an electronic access panel mounted on the corridor wall beside the heavy cellar door, with a small glowing screen displaying a chronological list of credential entries to restricted areas. Two entries clearly show a credential 'bento' opening the cellar door at 03:12 and again at 03:41 during the night, while a third shows no movement for 'margo' between midnight and six. Small status LEDs glow green and amber beside the screen. Composition: close-up still life, the access panel and its glowing credential list are the clear focal point, with legible timestamps. Mood: quiet, technical, suspicious, weighty, investigative. Important visual clues: electronic access panel, 'bento' cellar entries at 03:12 and 03:41, no movement for 'margo', status LEDs.

registro_portas.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Registro de portas do salão”. Show a sheet of paper taped beside the electronic access panel, with a handwritten manual log of who entered and left the tasting salon over the last night. An entry clearly shows 'Salles — 23h até depois das 4h' with a countersignature line signed 'Dora' attesting she accompanied him part of the time. A pencil on a string hangs beside the sheet. Composition: square close-up still life, the taped handwritten log sheet is the clear focal point, with legible entries and signatures. Mood: quiet, manual, grounded, quietly suspicious, investigative. Important visual clues: taped log sheet, Salles 23h-4h entry, Dora countersignature, pencil on string.

bento.prompt: Create a character portrait for Bento, the winemaker (enólogo) of Vinícola Seixas and Augusto's son. Bento is a Brazilian White man in his early 30s, fair skin with light brown stubble, soft green eyes, wavy dark brown hair pushed back, and a thin tired face with faint shadows under the eyes. He is dedicated, sensitive, and insecure under his father's shadow; he wants to protect the family estate at any cost. Appearance: a wine-stained off-white linen shirt with rolled sleeves, a dark apron, a leather lanyard with cellar keys, and a corkscrew in the apron pocket. The cuff and hem of his shirt show faint fresh red wine stains he is trying to hide by keeping his arms close. His expression is measured, serious, guarded, composed under pressure, with a faint tension around the eyes. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the stone-vaulted cellar with oak barrels softly blurred behind him, with warm amber lamp light and cool stone shadow on his face. He should look human, believable, intellectually careful, and morally complex rather than obviously villainous. Mood: restrained duty, hidden guilt, filial pressure, quiet defensiveness.

margo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Margô, a winemaker from a rival family who came to negotiate an old border dispute. Margô is a Brazilian Parda (mixed-race) woman in her mid-50s, warm tan skin with deep laugh lines, sharp dark brown eyes, and thick graying dark hair pulled into a practical low bun. She is direct, shrewd, and proud, treating the land feud as a matter of family honor. Appearance: a structured deep-plum blazer over a black turtleneck, a woven leather belt, small gold stud earrings, and a wristwatch. Her expression is firm, appraising, with a raised chin and a faint ironic set to the mouth. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the corridor of the estate with framed harvest photos softly blurred behind her, with cool dawn window light and warm amber sconce light on her face. She should look formidable, believable, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and bearing from every other character. Mood: proud directness, restrained hostility, shrewd honesty, defensive honor.

salles.prompt: Create a character portrait for Salles, a wine merchant who buys most of the estate's production. Salles is a Brazilian Mestizo man in his late 50s, medium tan skin with deep creases, slicked-back salt-and-pepper hair, a thick neatly trimmed gray beard, and warm hazel eyes. He is commercial, affable, and secretly pressed for cash; he treats the estate as his main client and fears losing it. Appearance: a slightly worn brown tweed jacket over a cream shirt, a burgundy ascot, a vintage wristwatch, and a leather satchel strap across the chest. His expression is warmly familiar, a little too eager to please, with eyes that flick away when money is mentioned. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the tasting salon with inverted glasses and the cork board softly blurred behind him, with warm amber lamplight and soft daylight. He should look seasoned, believable, commercially smooth, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and style from every other character. Mood: affable commerce, hidden financial worry, eager cooperation, folksy evasion.

dora.prompt: Create a character portrait for Dora, the freelance sommelière hired for the centennial dinner. Dora is a Brazilian Afro-descendant woman in her early 30s, deep brown skin, high cheekbones, natural coily black hair cropped short, and alert dark brown eyes behind thin round glasses. She is precise, professional, and observant, noticing small sensory anomalies others miss. Appearance: a crisp black sommelier apron over a pressed white shirt, a small silver lapel pin, a tasting cup on a cord around the neck, and a wristwatch. Her expression is composed, focused, professionally curious, with a slight furrow that says she has noticed something off. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the tasting salon with bottles and glasses softly blurred behind her, with warm amber lamplight and soft daylight. She should look sharp, professional, believable, and clearly distinct in ethnicity, age, and role from every other character. Mood: precise professionalism, quiet observation, honest caution, restrained curiosity.

nair.prompt: Create a character portrait for Nair, the housekeeper who has lived in the main house for forty years and found the body. Nair is a Brazilian woman of mature years, in her late 60s, medium-brown Mestiza skin with deep lines, warm dark brown eyes, and silver-streaked dark hair pulled back in a practical bun under a headscarf. She is observant, loyal, and practical, and notices what no one else does. Appearance: a simple navy-blue house dress with a white apron, a folded cloth over one arm, a small cross on a thin chain, and a ring of keys at her waist. Her expression is compassionate, shaken but composed, watchful, with a quiet sorrow for the dead patriarch. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the estate corridor with the vintage wall clock and access panel softly blurred behind her, with warm amber sconce light and cool dawn window light. She should look warm, grounded, believable, maternal, and clearly distinct in age, ethnicity, and role from every other character. Mood: compassionate observation, quiet shock, practical loyalty, watchful neutrality.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “A Pipa de 1924”. Show the stone-vaulted underground cellar of Vinícola Seixas after the mystery is resolved, now quiet under a cool dawn light filtering down the spiral staircase. The dented oak barrel stands calm with its brass spigot now closed, and a small empty crystal glass sits on the tasting bench beside an open box stamped 'LOTE 1924', symbolizing the fraud that was uncovered. The pool of spilled red wine on the stone floor has been mopped but leaves a dark stain. No people in the frame. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the closed spigot, the empty glass, the open 1924 box, and the mopped stain as symbols of resolution and painful truth. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary, somber.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “A Pipa de 1924”. Show the stone-vaulted cellar still in shadow, with the dented oak barrel half lit by a single amber lamp and the brass spigot still slightly open, dripping. The unlabeled bottle and the used crystal glass sit on the tasting bench, only partly in the light, as if the truth was only half uncovered. The pool of spilled red wine remains on the stone floor at the foot of the barrel. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the half-lit dented barrel, the dripping spigot, the half-lit bottle and glass, with deeper shadows around the frame. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort, somber.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “A Pipa de 1924”. Show the stone-vaulted cellar after the wrong conclusion has been accepted. The dented oak barrel gleams undisturbed in warm amber light, the open wooden box stamped 'LOTE 1924' is closed and pushed to the back of a shelf, and a black notebook on the tasting bench has its marked speech page turned face-down, as if the truth was deliberately set aside. The brass spigot on the dented barrel remains, faintly, slightly open, dripping one slow drop. The atmosphere is warm but heavy with shadow, suggesting that the guilty party walked away into a calm, indifferent morning. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the undisturbed dented barrel, the closed 1924 box, the face-down notebook, and the slightly dripping spigot. No characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary, somber indifference.
